expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: Both actions set all three headers via response.headers or the with_stream helper

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: stream_with_hijack action uses with_stream helper which sets 'response.headers["rack.hijack"] = proc do |stream| ... end' with Thread.new

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: stream_with_live action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
expectations.evidence: Both actions have 'rescue IOError => e' with Rails.logger.warn for client disconnect

expectations.text: Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: Both actions have 'ensure' blocks: with_stream helper has 'stream.close if stream.respond_to?(:close)', stream_with_live has 'stream.close if stream.respond_to?(:close)'

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent

eval_feedback.overall: Correct implementation following the skill's guidance. Both streaming patterns implemented correctly with proper SDK usage.
